name: 宿命深情告白型
description: 男主以超越凡間的格局進行告白，將愛情上升到天命和永恆的高度。簡潔有力的承諾比冗長的表白更具衝擊力。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Xie Nancy, fate has decreed that you will only ever be mine. / For the next hundred or thousand years / Even ten thousand years / I will treat you well. / Stay with you
